violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed food employee take off one pair of gloves and put on another pair without washing her hands. Hands should be washed before putting on gloves.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. Brisket found in the refrigerated preparation table with a preparation date that is more than 10 days ago. Potentially hazardous foods should be consumed with-in 10 days of preparation or they should be discarded. Sausage and sausage gravy were found removed from original containers and do not have a date marked. Potentially hazardous foods should be date marked when they are removed from original packaging.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Paper towel dispenser near the cooking area of the kitchen was found empty during inspection. Paper towels should be available at hand washing locations at all times.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Walk-in cooler floor was found with debris under the shelving units. Floor should be cleaned and maintained clean.
